title: Successful Google OAuth Login and Role Selection
description: Verify that a user can successfully log in using Google OAuth and is prompted to select a role (seeker or employer) for onboarding.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Click on the Google OAuth login button
Check that Google OAuth flow completes successfully
Verify user is redirected to role selection screen
Select a user role (seeker or employer)
Confirm navigation to appropriate onboarding flow based on selected role

title: Seeker Onboarding Form Validation
description: Validate the seeker onboarding form accepts valid inputs and rejects invalid or missing fields according to rules (nationality, TOPIK level, occupation).

steps.description: Navigate to seeker onboarding form
Input valid nationality, TOPIK level, and occupation
Check form allows submission when all fields are valid
Clear mandatory fields and try to submit form
Verify appropriate validation error messages are displayed
Input invalid values (e.g. invalid TOPIK level format)
Check validation prevents form submission and shows errors

title: Employer Onboarding Form Validation
description: Validate the employer onboarding form requires and correctly processes company name information.

steps.description: Navigate to employer onboarding form
Enter a valid company name
Verify form submission succeeds
Leave company name empty and submit
Verify validation error for missing company name is shown

title: Job Listings Filtering and Sorting
description: Ensure that job listings can be filtered by nationality, work location type, and country, and sorted by latest and popularity with accurate results.

steps.description: Navigate to job listings page
Apply filter for a specific nationality
Check that job posts shown match the selected nationality filter
Clear filters and apply work location type filter
Verify job posts correspond to selected work location type
Apply country filter
Verify jobs relate only to chosen country
Sort job posts by latest
Confirm jobs are ordered in descending order of posting date
Sort job posts by popularity
Verify jobs are ordered correctly by popularity metric

title: Pagination on Job Listings
description: Verify that pagination works correctly on the job listings page and navigating pages updates job posts accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to job listings page with multiple pages of results
Confirm initial page displays expected number of job posts
Click to navigate to next page
Verify job listings update to next set of results
Click to navigate back to previous page
Confirm correct previous page results are displayed

title: Job Detail Page Display and Actions
description: Check correct and complete display of job details, company info, and functionality of apply, save, and share actions on job detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to a job detail page from job listings
Verify all job description fields and company info are displayed accurately
Click the apply button
Check that apply workflow is triggered correctly
Click the save job button
Verify the job is added to user's liked jobs
Use the share options
Ensure share functionality triggers appropriate options and links

title: User Profile Update and Persistence
description: Validate that users can edit their personal information and changes persist and reflect immediately on their profile page.

steps.description: Log in and navigate to My Page
Edit personal information fields such as name, contact info
Save profile changes
Confirm changes are saved successfully
Reload or revisit My Page
Verify updated information is displayed correctly

title: Employer Job Post Creation and Editing
description: Verify employers can create new job posts, edit existing ones, and changes are saved and reflected properly.

steps.description: Log in as an employer and navigate to new job post creation page
Fill in valid job post details
Submit new job post
Check job post is created and listed in employer posts
Edit an existing job post
Change job details and save
Verify updated details are shown in the job post list

title: Job Post Status Toggling by Employer
description: Ensure employers can toggle the visibility/status of job posts (e.g., active/inactive) and changes take effect accordingly.

steps.description: Log in as employer and view the list of job posts
Toggle status of a job post from active to inactive
Confirm status change is saved and reflected
Toggle status back to active
Verify job post becomes visible again on public listings if approved

title: Admin Approval Workflow for Job Posts
description: Test that admin can view pending job posts, approve or reject them, and that approval controls the job post visibility on the platform.

steps.description: Log in to admin dashboard
Navigate to pending job posts review page
Verify list of pending job posts is displayed
Approve a pending job post
Confirm job post status updates and becomes visible in public listings
Reject another job post
Verify rejected job post is not visible publicly

title: Validation for Job Post Creation Form Fields
description: Check that the job post creation form enforces correct validation rules and shows error messages for incorrect or missing data.

steps.description: Navigate to the job post creation form
Submit the form with empty mandatory fields
Verify validation errors are shown for missing required fields
Enter invalid data formats into fields (e.g., invalid dates or text where numbers expected)
Check that appropriate validation messages appear and submission is blocked

title: Responsiveness and Accessibility Across Pages
description: Verify that the application UI is responsive on various devices and meets accessibility standards including keyboard navigation and screen reader support.

steps.description: Open key pages (landing, job listings, onboarding, profile) on desktop and mobile screen sizes
Confirm layouts adapt fluidly without content cutoff or overlap
Navigate pages using only keyboard controls
Verify all interactive elements can be accessed and operated via keyboard
Run accessibility tool scans on pages
Ensure no critical accessibility errors are detected
